description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a dark brown finish, featuring a classic tapered cylindrical shape that widens at the barrel and narrows toward the handle. The most striking feature is the array of large, metallic nails driven through the barrel, protruding at various angles and giving the bat a menacing, improvised weapon appearance. The nails are silver-gray and vary in length, with their heads and points clearly visible from all sides. The wood grain is subtly visible, and the bat has a smooth, slightly glossy surface. There are no visible brand logos, grip tape, or decorative markings on the handle or barrel. The end cap is rounded and unadorned, matching the rest of the bat's wooden material.
description: A dark brown wooden baseball bat with numerous large silver nails driven through its barrel, giving it a rugged, weapon-like appearance. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible logos or grip tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat and a clear arrangement of nails protruding from the barrel, with the heads and points visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the bat and the way the nails jut out horizontally from the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the bat, with the nails' points and heads visible in a mirrored arrangement to the front.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the distribution of nails and the smooth, uninterrupted handle.
